'''Gralish [[Liqueur/Legends|liqueur]]''' was a blue-green [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage. Master thief [[Moranda Savich]] was fond of sipping the beverage—so much so that [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] agent [[Hal Horn]] tracked her whereabouts on [[Darkknell/Legends|Darkknell]] by checking the few places in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Xakrea]] where it was sold.

{{Food-stub}}

*{{StoryCite|story=Interlude at Darkknell|book=Tales from the New Republic}} {{1st}}
